title: hieracium balbisianum subsp. pseudohumile
intro: Hieracium balbisianum subsp. pseudohumile, commonly known as a type of hawkweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium balbisianum subsp. pseudohumile include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in salves and ointments to aid in wound healing.
